title: Expand documentation component catalog
description: Grow from the initial 8 modules to the full component set from the guide, including GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, Backend, Cache, MessageQueue, OAuth, IaC, Monitoring, Security, CLI, SDK, Microservice, and more.

checklist.text: Audit existing generated module catalog and missing guide components.
Add new component descriptors for API styles, backend, infrastructure, operations, and tooling modules.
Add useful presets that expose the expanded catalog without extra UI work.
Cover catalog coverage and generation behavior with tests.
Verify compile, lint, tests, and package dry run.
